notes:
v1.1.0 Update
✨ Alert Chirps: GMs can mark posts as alerts, highlight them in the feed, and notify Chirp accounts.
✨ Direct message images now support previews and lightbox viewing.
✨ Users can edit their own posts, and GMs can edit any post.
✨ Added bookmarks view from the user's own profile.
✨ GMs can set fake follower and following counts for accounts.
⚡ Increased the composer input height for longer posts.

announcement.title: 🐦 Chirp App v1.1.0
announcement.content:
Chirp App v1.1.0 is ready.

  • Alert Chirps: GMs can mark posts as alerts. Alert posts are highlighted in the feed and notify Chirp accounts.
  • Post Editing: Users can edit their own posts, and GMs can edit any post.
  • Direct Message Images: DMs now support image attachments with previews and lightbox viewing.
  • Bookmarks: Users can open a bookmarks screen from their own profile.
  • Fake Follows: GMs can set fake follower and following counts for accounts.
  • Composer Space: The post composer input is taller for longer posts.
